pr.title: Record Submission: 1.1086 BPB - Turbo-Muon + EngramLite + ParamBanking (11L 512d)

output.summary: Pairs Turbo-Muon optimizer tweaks with EngramLite hash embeddings, parameter banking, U-Net skips, value reinjection, and GPTQ mixed-precision compression.
techniques: Turbo-Muon with AOL/Polar Express plus row_col normalization
EngramLite hash embeddings, ValueEmbedding, and U-Net style skips over parameter-banked weights
GPTQ int6/int7 quantization with late QAT and Brotli-byte-shuffled compression
